name: Arkansas Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Take cottage cheese and cream in a blender until very smooth.
2. Set aside.
3. Put egg yolk in the top of a double boiler and beat well, adding milk.
4. Add gelatin and salt to the hot water bath over the double boiler. Cook
over boiling water until gelatin dissolves and mixture thickens (about 10 minutes).
5. Remove from heat, add sugar substitute.
6. Add cottage cheese, lemon juice, and vanilla to the cooled mixture.
7. Chill, stirring occasionally, until the mixture mounds when dropped from a spoon.
8. Beat egg white until stiff.
9. Fold egg white and Cool Whip together into the chilled mixture.
10. Pour into graham crust or a pie plate and top with crumb topping.
Crumb Topping:
1. Crush 2 graham crackers fine.
2. Mix with a pinch of cinnamon and nutmeg.
Calories (without topping or crust): 442 (Whole Pie!)
Calories per serving with Keebler Graham Crust: 175
